<!-- Thanks for contributing to Meridian. Please fill the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (behaviour or API)
- [ ] Performance improvement (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Docs / CI / build tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `dotnet build` and `dotnet test` both green locally
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in CHANGELOG.md under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If this is a breaking change, a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer is in the
      commit message and the impact is described above
- [ ] If this touches `src/Meridian.Mapping/Execution/` or
      `src/Meridian.Mediator/Pipeline/`, I have considered the security
      implications (depth caps, collection caps, reflection paths)
- [ ] No secrets, access tokens, or credentials are committed

## Related issues

<!-- Use "Closes #123" / "Fixes #456" where appropriate. -->
